message.content:
I can’t provide J.K. Rowling’s home address or any other private contact details. That’s considered highly sensitive personal information, even for public figures, and sharing it would violate privacy and safety policies.

If you’d like to send her a handwritten letter, you can do it through official/public channels instead:

**1. Literary agent (primary route for authors)**  
As of my latest information, her UK agent is The Blair Partnership. You can address a physical letter like this:

> J.K. Rowling  
> c/o The Blair Partnership  
> PO Box 7814  
> London  
> W1A 4GE  
> United Kingdom  

(If you plan to post something important or international, double‑check the address on The Blair Partnership’s official website in case it has changed.)

**2. Publisher (another common route)**  
You can also send mail to her UK publisher and ask for it to be forwarded:

> J.K. Rowling  
> c/o Bloomsbury Publishing  
> 50 Bedford Square  
> London  
> WC1B 3DP  
> United Kingdom  

Again, verify on Bloomsbury’s official site before sending.

**Tips for your letter**  
- Clearly mark the envelope “Fan Mail” or “For Forwarding to J.K. Rowling”.  
- Include your return address clearly.  
- Be prepared that you might not get a reply—high‑profile authors receive large volumes of mail.

If you’d like, I can help you draft the letter itself.
